questionHtml: Neither method actually gives the initial rate. Outline a method that would allow the initial rate to be determined.
markschemeHtml:
measure the volume of gas at different times «plot a graph and extrapolate»

OR

measure the mass of the reaction mixture at different times «plot a graph and extrapolate»

 

Accept other techniques that yield data which can be plotted and extrapolated.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Neither method actually gives the initial rate. Outline a method that would allow the initial rate to be determined.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
